home.hero_subtitle: Delivered straight to your doorstep within hours with premium quality.

home.slide1_desc: Explore our signature 18k yellow gold and white gold diamond solitaire rings. Perfect for weddings, proposals, and lifetime memories.
home.slide2_desc: Adorn yourself with masterfully crafted necklaces, chokers, and bridal neckwear set in solid 22k gold and premium gemstones.
home.slide3_desc: Celebrate your grand day with timeless heirloom bridal sets, meticulously set with uncut Polki diamonds and fine rubies.

footer.about_desc: Your premier online destination for premium luxury jewellery, rings, necklaces, earrings, and designer bracelets. Masterfully crafted with unmatched elegance and premium materials.
footer.contact_desc: Feel free to drop us a note or call our dedicated helpline support desk. We are available 24/7.
footer.copyright: © 2026 SSJewellery Ltd. All rights reserved. Made with love in India.

livechat.welcome_msg: Hello! I am your SSJewellery support assistant. How can I help you today?

responses.order_status: To track your order, please log into your account, click on your profile, and select 'My Orders & Status'. You can live track all dispatched orders.
responses.returns: We offer a 7-day hassle-free return policy. If you wish to return a delivered item, open 'My Orders', expand the specific order, and click 'Request Return'.
responses.payments: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD), UPI, and all major Debit/Credit Cards. If you encountered a payment issue at checkout, please try again or choose COD.
responses.other: I will connect you with a live human representative shortly. Please remain online. You can also raise a formal support ticket from the 'Support Center'.

faq_1.question: What is SSJewellery?
faq_1.answer: SSJewellery is a premium luxury e-commerce brand specializing in masterfully crafted rings, necklaces, earrings, bracelets, bangles, and bridal collections.

faq_2.question: How do I track my order?
faq_2.answer: Go to the 'My Orders' tab in the navbar. You will see the delivery status, purchase details, and estimated delivery dates for all your orders.

faq_3.question: What is the OTP verification during checkout?
faq_3.answer: To secure your transaction, we send a 6-digit OTP code to your registered email. Enter this OTP during checkout to complete your order.

faq_4.question: Is cash on delivery available?
faq_4.answer: Currently, we only support placing simulated orders with secure digital profiles and OTP checks. No actual credit card integrations are required.

faq_5.question: How do I contact support?
faq_5.answer: Fill out the contact form on this page or use the live chat assistant widget in the bottom-right corner for quick responses.

support_page.send_failed: Failed to deliver message. Check backend connection.
